title: Price increase in gaming components: RAM to rise up to 50% and big tech warns of further increases

title: Microsoft denies that GTA 6 sells eight times more on PS5 than on Xbox and asks to wait for actual data

summary: The DC film fails to take off and its opening is compared to that of Joker 2.

summary: The Polish company simplifies its corporate identity, although CD Projekt Red remains the developer studio.

summary: Ubisoft Barcelona staff protest against the staff cuts announced by the company.
